scripts.install:all: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('.env') && fs.existsSync('.env.example')) fs.copyFileSync('.env.example', '.env');" && npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('.env')) fs.copyFileSync('.env', 'backend/.env');" && (cd backend && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push --force-reset && npx prisma db seed)
scripts.dev: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('.env')) fs.copyFileSync('.env', 'backend/.env');" && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run start:dev --prefix backend"
scripts.test:all: npm run test:back && npm run test:front
